title: Booking Notes Validation - Punctuation Rejection

assertions.expected: Booking details page loads; notes field visible
assertions.actual: Reservation details page loaded in 1.1s; notes field visible and editable

assertions.step: In Booking Notes field, type invalid notes with punctuation
assertions.expected: Notes field accepts input; client-side validation warns or rejects
assertions.actual: Typed: 'Room 123, guest arrives at 3 PM. Needs: WiFi/parking'; field accepted input

assertions.expected: Save rejected; error message shows: invalid characters (comma, period, slash)
assertions.actual: Save button clicked; API returned 400 Bad Request; error displayed: 'Notes contain invalid characters: comma (,), period (.), slash (/)'

assertions.step: Clear field and type valid notes
assertions.expected: Valid notes (letters, numbers, spaces, apostrophe, dash only) accepted
assertions.actual: Typed: 'Room 123 guest arrives at 3 PM Needs WiFi and parking'; no validation error ✓

assertions.step: Verify Save succeeds with valid notes
assertions.actual: Save button clicked; PUT /api/v1/booking returned 200 OK; toast 'Booking saved' displayed ✓

validation_rules.enforcement: backend (400 Bad Request on invalid input)

notes: File coverage: src/validators/noteValidator.ts:12-35. Backend validation correctly rejects punctuation per spec SD4.1.2. Valid notes accepted after correction.
